title: User Profil Bilgisi Tamamlayabilsin
description: Yeni user registration'dan sonra profil bilgilerini tamamlamalı. Fitness goals, current level, photos upload edebilir.
business_value: Core onboarding - Necessary for program matching
acceptance_criteria: Registration sonrası 'Complete Your Profile' modal'ı gösterilir
User zorunlu alanları doldurmali: First Name, Last Name, Age, Height, Weight
Optional alanlar: Gender, Fitness Goal, Current Fitness Level, Bio, Profile Photo
Fitness Goals: Weight Loss, Muscle Gain, Endurance, Strength, Flexibility
Current Level: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert
Validations: Reasonable age (18-100), height, weight ranges
User daha sonra profili edit edebilir
business_rules: Incomplete profile user coach search yapabilir ama assignment başında profile complete istenir
